feedback.text: There is a big issue in the gaming industry where corporations will destroy games that the consumer has already purchased. That hasn't happened to me but it has happened to countless other people. It's completely unacceptable for a company to just destroy a game like that when you already spent money on it. A far more extreme example would be someone selling you a house and then taking it back a few years later. I don't think something like that should be legal.
